title: Senior Teacher - ASCI International Enterprises - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - ASCI International Enterprises - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Join the ASCI International Enterprises family as a Senior Teacher in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ASCI International Enterprises:
ASCI International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ASCI International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
